title: misch origins, Babyface
description: Advanced halloween special, this isn't a dead by deadlight killer...
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c35c44ab4b3a66eaa48e5752a7e2744d5663f5a_0.webp)

# about the pack

, choose to spawn as Babyface

, original character, not based on anything, but inspired by many popular horror characters,,

_, dont forget to download the resourcepack_

![Babyface Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82c8bc13cb27b525917f1463cd0a2003d6533af5_0.webp)

![Babyface GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73cae1580501fc408e1da802522ee54fbed6b0e4.png)

![Additional Info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53dd77347171c5424df40bf8a33f68ff449f5d46_0.webp)

# notes
, Knife and Mask items are permanent, and cannot be lost on death

, the origin jumpscares players,,, this occurs after receiving Pediophobia,,, you've been warned

, only 1 Babyface per world please !

![Babyface Drawing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1782341b606b29b645931190d0ba5eac6bc2856.png)
